title: The Disappearing Train
content: Several travelers insisted they had seen an old train enter the station shortly before sunrise, yet it never appeared on the official schedule. Curious railway employees reviewed security recordings from the previous morning. They soon discovered that the mysterious train was a beautifully restored historical locomotive traveling to a nearby museum exhibition. Because it passed through the station without stopping, many passengers only caught a brief glimpse before it disappeared around the next curve. The unusual sight sparked countless rumors throughout the week, but the explanation proved just as fascinating as the mystery itself.
